context.role: Aerial obstacle requiring player to duck, appears after 200 points
context.screen_position: Scrolls from right (650px) to left (-100px), Y=50px (ground + 50px)
context.usage_scenario: Forces player to use duck action, overlaps with player running hitbox (90px height) requiring ducking to 55px height

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with long beak, outstretched wings in flight

animation.description: Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position - flapping animation

visual_specification.details: Flying pterodactyl with visible long beak, wings clearly showing up/down flapping motion

relationships.shared_with: Same sprite and animation as pterodactyl_high, only Y position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_high flies at Y=80px, this flies at Y=50px - lower height requires ducking

explicit_negations: No smooth curves - only pixel-aligned edges
No colors outside the defined palette
No variation in flight path - straight horizontal movement only
Not visually different from pterodactyl_high - same sprite, different Y position
